relevantQuotes.subject: Lettuce Entertain You Restaurants
relevantQuotes.quote: How freaking awesome is it that all the Lettuce Entertain You restaurants, and there are a lot, have allergy info available and a responsible protocol in place for dealing with allergies? Many offer a gluten-free menu too!

notes: This source is family-experience based and allergy-specific to the author's household, so it should be used as supporting context rather than as universal proof.
It is still valuable as a direct quoted source about the Lettuce Entertain You group's allergy protocol reputation.
